name: wifi_portal_content_update

trigger.description: 04:00 every Monday, Europe/Stockholm. Also triggerable manually.

description: Generates the Wi-Fi portal content.json and uploads it to Cloud Storage. GREEN zone only — nothing personal, ever.

steps.notes: Read a small calendar/events source (git-managed JSON) — no RED/YELLOW inputs.
Compose the content-config JSON matching frontend/wifi-intake-portal/content-config.example.json shape.
Run green-only sanitizer. Abort on any blocked field.
